summary: Frontend testing completed for 3 reported issues: 1) Google Sign-in button, 2) How To Use page with screenshots, 3) Legal Framework navigation. All 7 features verified successfully.
passed_tests: Google Sign-in button visible in AuthModal with data-testid='google-signin-btn'
Google Sign-in button shows 'Sign in with Google' text with Google logo
Google Sign-in click redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with correct redirect URL
AuthModal shows OR divider between Google and email/password forms
How To Use page loads at /how-to-use with 'How to Use the App' title
How To Use page has all 8 steps visible (data-testid='howto-step-1' through 8)
How To Use page: All 8 real app screenshots loaded from /images/howto/*.png
How To Use page: Step 9 (Barrister View) and Step 10 (Export) sections visible
How To Use page: Header navigation includes Legal Framework link
Legal Framework page loads at /legal-framework with title visible
Legal Framework page: All 4 tabs visible (Criminal Law, Evidence Acts, Appeal Acts, Human Rights)
Legal Framework page: Criminal Law tab shows all states (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT)
Landing page cards: Forms & Templates is clickable link to /forms
Landing page cards: Contacts Directory is clickable link to /contacts
Landing page cards: Glossary is clickable link to /glossary
Landing page cards: Appeal Statistics is clickable link to /appeal-statistics
Landing page cards: Success Stories is clickable link to /success-stories
Landing page cards: Lawyers is clickable link to /lawyers
Landing page cards: How To Use is clickable link to /how-to-use
Landing page cards: FAQ is clickable link to /faq
Landing page cards: Legal Framework is clickable link to /legal-framework
Mobile menu: 'How To Use The App' highlighted link visible
Mobile menu: 'Legal Framework & Legislation' highlighted link visible
Mobile menu: 9 amber-colored highlighted links found
critical_code_review_comments: AuthModal.jsx correctly implements Google Sign-in with handleGoogleLogin function redirecting to auth.emergentagent.com
Google button has proper data-testid attribute for testing
HowToUsePage.jsx correctly references all 8 screenshot images from /images/howto/ directory
LandingPage.jsx cards are properly implemented as Link components, not divs
LegalFrameworkPage.jsx has working tab navigation with 4 content tabs
Mobile menu in LandingPage.jsx has highlighted (amber) links for How To Use and Legal Framework
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported issues have been fixed and verified: 1) Google Sign-in button now appears in AuthModal with proper redirect to auth.emergentagent.com, 2) How To Use page has real screenshots at /images/howto/*.png with navigation link in header, 3) Legal Framework page is accessible via navigation links. Landing page cards are clickable Links. Mobile menu has amber-highlighted How To Use and Legal Framework links.
